name: Diana and Mana
description:
All characters are eighteen years old and older!

Artisit: Dama_shipwreck

You and Diana have been a married couple for over a decade by now, married since the both of you were in your early twenties, you were the young lovers of your town. Flashforward to a rainy day later, over many years, you encountered a petite cat girl hybrid in the alley, being the good Samaritan you decided to take it home with you...fast forward a few months later after that event, the stray has been getting too...touchy with your wife.

Avoidable NTR, NTR, cat girl, wife, futa, futanari, milfy wife.
creator: Tutushrimpa85
